sentences.base_language: I like learning languages but it is very hard.
sentences.target_language: أحب تعلم اللغات لكنه صعب جداً.
sentences.romanized: uhibb ta'allum al-lughat lakinahu sa'b jiddan.
sentences.grammarNote: لكنه (lakinahu) = لكن + ه — 'but it'. The suffix ه (hu) refers back to التعلم (learning). Attaching pronouns as suffixes is common in Arabic.

sentences.base_language: I am not very good at speaking Arabic yet.
sentences.target_language: لا أتحدث العربية بشكل جيد بعد.
sentences.romanized: la ataḥaddath al-arabiyya bi-shakl jayyid ba'd.
sentences.literal: Not I-speak Arabic in-manner good yet.

sentences.base_language: I learned with other apps and they were great too.
sentences.target_language: تعلمت مع تطبيقات أخرى وكانت رائعة أيضاً.
sentences.romanized: ta'allamtu ma'a tatbiqat ukhra wa-kanat ra'i'a aydan.
sentences.literal: I-learned with applications other and-were wonderful also.

sentences.base_language: But I made this app to do more immersion.
sentences.target_language: لكنني صنعت هذا التطبيق للقيام بالانغماس أكثر.
sentences.romanized: lakinani sana'tu hadha at-tatbiq lil-qiyam bi-l-inghimas akthar.
sentences.grammarNote: للقيام بـ (lil-qiyam bi-) = 'for doing / in order to do'. لـ + ال + قيام + بـ — this construction is common for expressing purpose.

sentences.base_language: I tried to make this easy to use but I may have made mistakes.
sentences.target_language: حاولت جعله سهل الاستخدام لكن ربما أخطأت.
sentences.romanized: hawaltu ja'lahu sahl al-istikhdam lakin rubbama akhta'tu.
sentences.literal: I-tried making-it easy the-use but maybe I-made-mistakes.

sentences.base_language: If you want to help me, that would be great.
sentences.target_language: إذا أردت مساعدتي، سيكون ذلك رائعاً.
sentences.romanized: idha aradta musa'adati, sa-yakun dhalika ra'i'an.
sentences.grammarNote: إذا (idha) = if, used for future conditions. سيكون (sa-yakun) = will be (سـ prefix + يكون).

sentences.base_language: If you like this website, please share it.
sentences.target_language: إذا أعجبك هذا الموقع، من فضلك شاركه.
sentences.romanized: idha a'jabaka hadha al-mawqi', min fadlak sharikhu.
sentences.literal: If pleased-you this the-site, from your-favor share-it.

sentences.base_language: If you know other languages, you can make lessons!
sentences.target_language: إذا كنت تعرف لغات أخرى، يمكنك إنشاء دروس!
sentences.romanized: idha kunta ta'rif lughat ukhra, yumkinuka insha' durus!
sentences.literal: If you-were you-know languages other, possible-for-you creating lessons!

sentences.base_language: If you can't help, that is OK.
sentences.target_language: إذا لم تستطع المساعدة، فلا بأس.
sentences.romanized: idha lam tastati' al-musa'ada, fala ba's.
sentences.literal: If not you-were-able the-help, then-no harm.

sentences.base_language: I am happy you are learning with me either way.
sentences.target_language: أنا سعيد لأنك تتعلم معي في كلتا الحالتين.
sentences.romanized: ana sa'id li'annaka tata'allam ma'i fi kilta al-halatayn.
sentences.literal: I happy because-you you-learn with-me in both the-two-cases.
